name: Pooja R. Sonar
tagline: Software Developer specializing in MERN stack and AI-driven solutions for real-time, scalable web applications.
about: A results-driven Software Developer with a strong academic foundation (B.Tech, CGPA: 9.2) in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Object-Oriented Programming. Possessing hands-on experience in architecting real-time systems, developing scalable web applications, and contributing to AI-powered platforms. Recognized for robust problem-solving, leadership capabilities, and a commitment to continuous learning, as evidenced by hackathon successes and diverse internship experiences.
highlights: Architected real-time telemetry (10K+ readings/min) via Cosmos DB and Node.js; achieved 99.9% uptime.
Integrated Socket.IO and MQTT to serve 500+ farms with <100ms UI latency.
Built Next.js (TypeScript) + Redux dashboards for 50+ sensor cards with <200ms refresh.
Built and maintained scalable web applications using Next.js and TypeScript, optimizing front-end performance and UX.
Implemented RabbitMQ message-driven flows for decoupling services and enhancing reliability.
Secured 3rd place in a Hackathon organized by GDSC ADGITM.
Developed an AI-powered, gamified coding platform to help users learn programming languages with Gemini's API.

projects.name: AccessAI - CodeQuest (MERN)
projects.description: Developed an innovative, AI-powered gamified platform designed to enhance programming language acquisition. This comprehensive solution offered educational content, interactive coding challenges, and real-time AI assistance via Gemini's API, supporting languages like Solidity, JavaScript, CSS, and React.

projects.name: Chess.com Backend Clone (MERN)
projects.description: Engineered a robust, full-fledged backend clone of Chess.com using the MERN stack to replicate real-time chess gameplay. Implemented Socket.IO WebSockets for seamless synchronization of moves, clocks, and game states (resign/draw). Designed secure RESTful Express APIs for managing users, games, moves, and sessions, incorporating JWT (access+refresh), RBAC, rate limiting, and CORS.
